backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend canister placeholder with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report file with an empty features array, indicating no tracked features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the Flappy Boy game.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens and border radius.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Flappy Boy app, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the full-screen Game component as the sole UI element.
frontend/src/components/Game.tsx: Main Canvas-based game component that draws the scrolling classroom background, animated boy character, and pipe obstacles using requestAnimationFrame, passing easter egg state flags to GameUI.
frontend/src/components/GameUI.tsx: HTML overlay component rendering the score HUD, start/game-over screens, and three street-art styled easter egg overlays triggered at scores 5, 10, and 15.
frontend/src/data/negativeComments.ts: Exports an array of 20 negative comment strings and a helper function that returns a random one for use as pipe obstacle labels.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameState.ts: Custom hook managing all Flappy Boy game logic including physics, obstacle spawning, collision detection, scoring, and three one-shot easter eggs at scores 5, 10, and 15 that slow the game to 5% speed for 5 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, and identity state to the React component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder module indicating no backend queries are needed since all game state is local.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Bangers, Nunito), sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a warm street-art-inspired OKLCH color palette as CSS custom properties.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps OKLCH CSS variables to semantic color tokens, adds custom fonts (Bangers, Nunito), border radii, keyframe animations, and enables typography/container-queries/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 19) tracking implemented features, known issues, and architectural notes for a Flappy Bird-style game with a street-art theme and negative comment bubble obstacles.
